nasb.text: For who is there of all flesh who has heard the voice of the living God speaking from the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?

esv.text: For who is there of all flesh, that has heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of fire as we have, and has still lived?

cnv.text: 因為有血肉生命的人，有誰像我們一樣，聽見永活的　神從火中說話的聲音，還能活著呢？

ccb.text: 世上有谁像我们一样听见永活上帝从火中说话后还能活着呢？
